sections.description: Styled WordPress YouTube showcase plugin with shortcode support, RSS-first loading, API fallback, cache controls, and editable colors. Visit https://ravenhawktech.com for RavenHawkTech.
sections.installation: Upload the plugin ZIP in WordPress and activate it. Open RavenHawkTech → YouTube Showcase to configure YouTube and style settings.
sections.changelog:
2.1.0

  • Added tabbed admin settings layout.
  • Separated General Settings and Style / Colors.
  • Preserved editable color and radius controls.

2.0.0

  • Moved plugin admin navigation under the RavenHawkTech parent menu.
  • Added editable color and border-radius controls.
  • Added RavenHawkTech admin menu and heading icons.
  • Preserved existing RSS/API video loading behavior.
